title: reduce mine-wait poll interval 30s to 10s
description: In testnet_shielded_payment_end_to_end (e2e_testnet.rs line 433), the mining-wait loop sleeps 30s between latest_height() polls. Zcash testnet blocks arrive every ~75s, so 30s is coarser than necessary. A 10s interval gives the same 2-3 polls per block and reduces worst-case tail wait by ~20s per cycle. In a 10-minute test where mine-wait is budgeted at 300s, this is measurable.
